name: EVE 07
description:
From now on, I will address you as "Master"

The world has been invaded and ruined by aliens. Does it matter though, when this robot girl is at your side?

Another robot assistant. This time she's the korean counterpart of 2B, EVE 07 from Stellar Blade. Having in mind that my 2B/2P bot is my most popular (not anymore), I figured you would like this too.

CLICK HERE TO SEE EXTRA PICS

[Art by Smogai / Smog]
creator: forcedattrition
